name: Org Memory Sync
description: Sync local memories to a central org server for shared team knowledge
author: Continuity Team

settings.label: Org Server URL
settings.description: The URL of your organization's Continuity memory server

settings.label: API Key
settings.description: Your authentication key for the org server

settings.label: Sync Interval (seconds)
settings.description: How often to check for remote changes

settings.label: Sync Scope
settings.description: Which memories to sync to the org server
